siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 8 at 40 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 6 HSPU, 5 Clean 60/40, 10/8 AB SPRINT. For hypertrophy, focus on back, hamstrings, rear delts.
